EXPORT- IMPORT BANK OF WASHINGTON

WASHINGTON 25

OFFICE OF THE CHAIRMAN

CABLE ADDRESE

Xay 28, 1946

Ily daRT Is, BIvas

I am glad to infor, you that the Export-Inport Bank

of Hashirgton bar approva the establishaent of a credit af $650, 000,000 1a Tatar of the Republie of France.

The credit

VIlI bear Interest at the rate of thron per cost (36) par anu. It vill be roparable over a period of 25 Joara; during the first firo of which Interest only mill be pajablo.

The utilization of the credit IIl be upon such teras

and conditions as say be mutually agroad upon.

Every effort rill be rado to propare and exocuto tha
